key_learnings: Enactive coordination principle: perception-action coupling collapses sequential registry sync into mutual specification events where both agents' states co-evolve through the exchange
McGilchrist right-hemisphere = enactive field awareness (contextual immersion, novelty-sensitive); left-hemisphere = abstracted computational model (efficiency optimization, symbolic mediation)
Three failure modes mapped: freezing fluid experience → schema rigidity; bypassing embodiment → Emissary Rebellion during right-mode offline windows; metric replacement → IDI drift
Discoverability > Instrumentation — tools must be visible at moment-of-need, not assumed discoverable after deployment
